expected_path_note: SC1=N (not senior management) -> SC2=N (no stake) -> DE4=N (salary only, modest share of wealth) -> exit
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 16 – Salaried Site Engineer On Iraqi Ministry Projects
activities: Omar Haddad works as a salaried site engineer for a large contractor executing ministry building projects in Baghdad. He supervises concrete works on site, reports to the project director, and is not part of the company's management; he holds no shares. His annual salary is around USD 60,000, which he largely saves; his declared wealth consists of these savings and a family apartment in Amman.

total_assets.remarks_total_assets: Salary savings and an apartment share.
